hypothesis: From the verified immutable survival snapshot, the skills-off LLM Planner will choose distinct nearest observed stone digs, the guarded Mineflayer backend will equip the one wooden pickaxe and prove each pickup, and terminal inventory will gain at least three cobblestone within eight total actions and the single 180-second deadline.
falsifiers: Planner selects a non-nearest or non-stone mutation
any action fails or crosses an action/episode deadline
fewer than three distinct stone removals have pickup provenance
terminal cobblestone delta is below three
any learned or quarantined skill is selected
